package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_allocates_db_or_gorm_handle_per_request"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Database or GORM connections opened inside handlers or middleware instead of process-level setup."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
